user.title: Add DMI Observation
user.description: Enter the latitude and longitude you want to search around.

station_select.title: Select DMI Station
station_select.description: Select the nearest active station for latitude {latitude} and longitude {longitude}.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DMI Observation
reauth_confirm.description: Select the station the integration should reconnect to.

init.title: DMI Observation Options
init.description: Adjust how often data is fetched from DMI. The minimum is 600 seconds.
